title: elymus hispidus subsp. varnensis
intro: Elymus hispidus subsp. varnensis, also known as Elymus hispidus var. varnensis or Varn's wheatgrass, is a rare subspecies of the Elymus hispidus grass native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Elymus hispidus subsp. varnensis include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as providing relief from respiratory issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
